Iron Seif.description: The typical armament for any warrior or traveler in the lands of Amel.

Hide Shield.description: A common shield made of hippo hide.

Studded Leather Armor.description: Hide armor studded with solid iron caps improving resistance to strikes.

Iron Plated Helmet.description: The standard issued helmet for soldiers and mercenaries alike.

Sun Pendant.description: The sun, oh if only you knew what the world was like before the sun, an unending despair of cold and misery.
